ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent applying on behalf of the child */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the child for whom the application is made */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "admission_class" TEXT /* Classification of the application (e.g., priority, special priority) */,
  "has_nurs" TEXT /* Parent's attitude towards nursery education */,
  "form_of_care" TEXT /* Form of care (e.g., completed, foster) */,
  "number_of_children" TEXT /* Number of children in the family */,
  "housing_status" TEXT /* Housing situation of the family */,
  "financial_status" TEXT /* Financial situation of the family */,
  "social_status" TEXT /* Social situation of the family */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the child */,
  "application_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the application */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the final decision on the application was made */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision */,
  "support_services_required" INTEGER /* Boolean field to indicate if support services are required */,
  "support_services_provided" TEXT /* Text field to list the support services provided to the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_health_status FOREIGN KEY ("health_status") REFERENCES health ("health_status"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_social_status FOREIGN KEY ("social_status") REFERENCES social ("social_status"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_housing_status FOREIGN KEY ("housing_status") REFERENCES housing ("housing_status"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_financial_status FOREIGN KEY ("financial_status") REFERENCES financial ("financial_status")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the parent */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the parent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the parent */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the parent */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the parent */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the parent */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Level of education of the parent */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the parent */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "children" (
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the child */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the child */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the child */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the child */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* Any health conditions of the child */,
  "special_needs" TEXT /* Any special needs of the child */,
  "parental_consent" INTEGER /* Boolean field to indicate if parental consent has been given */,
  "immunization_records" TEXT /* Text field to store details of immunization records */,
  "developmental_milestones" TEXT /* Text field to store information about the child's developmental milestones */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing record */,
  "housing_status" TEXT /* Housing status of the family (e.g., convenient, critical) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the family's residence */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the family's residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the family's residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the family's residence */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Type of housing (e.g., apartment, house) */,
  "rent_or_own" TEXT /* Indicates whether the family rents or owns their home */,
  "number_of_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of rooms in the family's residence */,
  "living_conditions" TEXT /* Text field to describe the living conditions (e.g., overcrowded, adequate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "financial_status" TEXT /* Financial status of the family (e.g., convenient, inconv) */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the family */,
  "benefits_received" TEXT /* Benefits received by the family (e.g., social security, food stamps) */,
  "debt" REAL /* Total debt of the family */,
  "savings" REAL /* Total savings of the family */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the primary breadwinner */,
  "other_income_sources" TEXT /* Text field to list other income sources */,
  "tax_filing_status" TEXT /* Tax filing status of the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social record */,
  "social_status" TEXT /* Social status of the family (e.g., slightly_prob, problematic) */,
  "family_size" TEXT /* Number of members in the family */,
  "support_network" TEXT /* Support network available to the family */,
  "community_involvement" TEXT /* Level of community involvement of the family */,
  "family_activities" TEXT /* Text field to list family activities and hobbies */,
  "cultural_background" TEXT /* Cultural background of the family */,
  "language_spoken_at_home" TEXT /* Primary language spoken at home */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the child (e.g., recommended, not_recommended) */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the child */,
  "vaccinations" TEXT /* Vaccinations received by the child */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the child */,
  "primary_care_physician" TEXT /* Name of the child's primary care physician */,
  "medical_appointments" TEXT /* Text field to list upcoming medical appointments */,
  "medications" TEXT /* Text field to list any medications the child is taking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admissions officer, social worker, health professional) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Text field to list the user's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the application */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Text field to describe any actions taken during the access (e.g., approved application, updated health records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)
